interface.shortDescription: Generate beautiful, modern React UI components and search brand logos instantly through natural language using the 21st.dev Magic MCP server.
interface.longDescription: 21st connects agents to current library and framework documentation through the 21st MCP server, reducing stale API answers by resolving library IDs and fetching relevant docs on demand.
defaultPrompt: Use $21st to generate a React TSX component with shadcn/ui and Tailwind.
Use $21st to create or extend a design system: provide Tailwind tokens, component variants, and usage examples.
Use $21st to ensure accessibility and responsive design: suggest aria attributes and Tailwind utilities.
